improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Start with three free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:site_name" content="GDN AI">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the product value and free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, consistent previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for B2B audiences. Including the pricing and free searches in the description creates urgency and sets clear expectations, reducing bounce rates.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a professional workspace built for business owners and traders. Try three free searches — no card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately introduces Gideon by name and clarifies its purpose (AI assistant for trade and business), building brand recognition. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while addressing the target audience directly. Ending with the free trial offer and 'no card required' removes friction and encourages immediate engagement.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, billed monthly or annually—with annual plans saving you 30 percent. As a member, you'll unlock voice chat, an unlimited workspace, and Gideon's full professional capabilities.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in a freemium model—what happens at the paywall. By clearly explaining the transition from free to paid, it reduces uncertainty, builds trust, and positions the membership as accessible and valuable. Mentioning the annual savings encourages higher-commitment conversions.
